_README: Extra initialisms in counterparty names that must keep their capitals.
The report title-cases company names, because banks file them in capitals
and 'PAK LAY POWER COMPANY LIMITED' is hard to read. Tokens listed here are
left alone, so EDL stays EDL rather than becoming Edl.
Nothing structural separates EDL from PAK, so this has to be a list.
Add any acronym the report is rendering wrongly. Case does not matter.
